subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! O ye kindred of the blessed Tree! The tongue is moved to praise the friends and companions of Persia [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حضرات افنان سدره مبارکه زبان بستایش دوستان پارسی و یاران
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @past, present and future of Iran
